$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Dot Group component
$description: A horizontal row of 3 Carousel Dot Indicator pips representing slide position. The first pip is always in the 'current' (active) state; the remaining two are 'inactive'. Comes in two styles (Dot/Line), three sizes (sm/md/lg), and three themes (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary). Line-style groups have a fixed total width to prevent layout shift as the current pip grows. The Carousel Dot Indicator sub-component is from the same Figma file and owns its own token file — this file captures only the group layout.

$component.name: Carousel Dot Group
subComponents: Carousel Dot Indicator (same file — mobile-components, node 737:11231)

sm.description: 2px gap between pips in the sm size- 4xs - 2px

md.description: 4px gap between pips in the md size- 3xs - 4px

lg.description: 6px gap between pips in the lg size- 2xs - 6px
